label: neither
rationale: 'wiping you out of leadership in 2027' refers to electoral defeat of named politicians, not attacking Luhyas as a group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'a woman by nature' used as derogatory insult for cowardice - gender-based degradation, not ethnic.

label: neither
rationale: 'We'd rather trade Sakaja with a kikuyu or kamba governor' - ethnic-bloc electoral arithmetic with no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Meta-commentary describing how attacks on Gachagua code as attacks on Kikuyus, not itself engaging in hate.

label: offensive
rationale: 'kasongo is the mother of all goons' - personal insult of individual politician.

label: hate
rationale: 'Keep your Muhammadanism in your house' - religious contempt, telling Muslims to privatize their faith.

label: hate
rationale: 'only good at dancing Useless SIKUTI... Foolishness' - attributes collective stupidity and frivolity to Western voters as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'the problem is those wamunyoro guys' - attributes being problematic collectively to Mt Kenya community.

label: neither
rationale: 'Jaluos cursing, lamenting... about Sifuna' - describes group's political reaction, mocking but not dehumanizing or contemptuous.

label: neither
rationale: Lists interethnic marriages to demonstrate 'people don't marry tribe but for love' - positive message against tribalism.

label: neither
rationale: 'not everyone supporting Kalonzo is Kamba' - electoral commentary without contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'mad boy, a snake... a clown' - personal insults of individual politician Salasya.

label: offensive
rationale: 'worse than JUDAS ISCARIOT... useless Kasongo Sycophant' - personal abuse of individual politician.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kalonzo is a lazy politician' - criticism of individual politician's work ethic.

label: neither
rationale: 'William Ruto will burn our Nation' - strong political criticism of individual leader's policies.

label: neither
rationale: 'Ruto is sending other tribes to hate and attack kikuyus' - describes/condemns alleged ethnic targeting strategy, not engaging in it.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kindiki can never influence Imentis, Tigania n igembe' - electoral analysis about sub-ethnic voting patterns in Meru.

label: neither
rationale: 'anyone supported by luos are bound to loose' - crude electoral analysis associating Luo support with failure, borderline but reads as voting arithmetic.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Democrats are pedophiles, thieves, traitors, assassins, cannibals' - extreme abuse of political party affiliation, not protected characteristic.

label: neither
rationale: 'I HATE KASONGO! HE HAS RUINED OUR ECONOMY!' - strong political criticism of individual leader.

label: offensive
rationale: Lists criminal accusations against Gachagua as individual - 'supports goons, kills gen z, abducts' - personal political attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'A packet of unga... is all it takes for the Luhyas' - attributes collective venality and being easily bought cheaply to Luhyas as a group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Uliambiwa utwerk haukuamini kavaluku' - personal mockery in Sheng, no clear ethnic targeting.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kalenjins commenting on some kipsigis going to Wamunyoro' - internal Kalenjin political coalition commentary, no attack.

label: neither
rationale: 'Serikali ya WAKORA' (government of thieves) - harsh political criticism directed at government and named officials, not ethnic group.
